text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello. I'm currently giving a rundown of the Unity
Cup to those who want to learn about it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Do you want to hear an explanation too,
<username>?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What would you like me to explain?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What should I ask about?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Unity Cup is a team-based competition held
by Tracen Academy that runs concurrently with
the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Whereas the Twinkle Series tests individual
performance, the Unity Cup puts emphasis on
teamwork.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Unity Cup consists of a series of preseason
rounds followed by the finals.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The four rounds of preseason races are held to
decide your team's ranking.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you'd like to learn more about Team Ranking,
please ask me about team stats! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There will be plenty of downtime between
preseason matches, so use it to train up your
team members!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I recommend raising your team's
strength through Unity Training!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you'd like to learn more about Unity Training,
please ask me about team members and Unity
Training! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Once the preseason's over, the finals will begin!
This final round of races determines the victors of
the Unity Cup!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Even if you don't do as well as you wanted in the
preseason, if you win the finals, then you win the
whole tournament!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Make sure not to lose hope and keep aiming for
victory right until the very end!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's everything about the Unity Cup. Is there
anything else you'd like to know about?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Unity Cup is held after the late June and late
December turns end.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Teams will compete in five categories—sprint,
mile, medium, long, and dirt.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You must enter at least one runner in each race,
and up to three can be assigned to each
category.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
At the beginning of each Unity Cup match, a
team will be formed automatically from the
members you have recruited.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But don't worry, you can edit your team manually,
too! Feel free to arrange your racers as best you
see fit!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Once you've finalized your team, you can select
an opponent to face.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you defeat the opposing team, it will help your
trainee grow stronger...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And the higher your opponent's Team Ranking,
the more growth you can expect.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Defeating high-ranking opponents will also grant
a larger increase to your own Team Ranking!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
However, your ranking won't go up if you lose, so
aim for victory!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can use the pre-race predictions to help you
decide who to take on.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Once you've chosen an opponent, it's time for the
races. Whichever team places first in the majority
of the five races is deemed the victor!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's not all! If you clear the following three
conditions during the preseason, you'll be able to
challenge an elite team!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
First, raise your team ranking to a certain level.
Second, raise your team power to a certain level.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Third, have team members who have triggered an
Extreme Spirit Burst.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You'll get a great reward if you beat this elite
team... and something special might happen in
the finals!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Strive for victory and create the best team out
there!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Once the preseason is over, the finals await you!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The team that wins the finals is crowned the
champion of the Unity Cup.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's everything about the Unity Cup races. Is
there anything else you'd like to know about?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume in your team are, naturally, your
team members.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
At the moment, your team members consist only
of your Trainee Umamusume,
<chrname>, and the Umamusume
featured in your Support Cards.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But fret not.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm certain that if you do well during the
preseason, more Umamusume will hear about
your team and want to join you!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume who join your team will be able
to participate in the Unity Cup races as well as
training.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There's one thing you need to keep in mind about
Umamusume in your team who are not featured in
Support Cards, though.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
They cannot trigger Friendship Training and won't
have hint events.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Next, let me explain Unity Training.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you train in the same location as your team
members, you can activate Unity Training, a form
of training where members mutually support each
other.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Whether or not a team member will trigger Unity
Training is randomly decided each time they are
assigned to a training type.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
A special icon will appear when Unity Training is
available, so keep your eyes peeled.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
During Unity Training, the attributes of the
participating team members will increase.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
What's more, if you perform Unity Training with
two or more team members at once, the effects of
that training on your trainee will increase as well.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The more members in a Unity Training session,
the more effective the training, so have fun
training with your team!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's one more thing I should tell you about
the frequency of Unity Training getting triggered.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The chances of it getting activated can be
boosted by Hint Frequency and the number of
members training.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Keep this in mind as you train your team!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Also, you have a chance of earning skill hints
after each Unity Training session!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And if you perform Unity Training enough times,
something special might happen.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
As team members perform Unity Training, their
dedication to the team will grow, which can lead
to a phenomenon known as a Spirit Burst!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Spirit Bursts help power up your team members
and may also grant your trainee skill hints.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Try to trigger Spirit Bursts for as many members
as you can to help your whole team grow
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: That's not all!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Team members who have triggered a Spirit Burst
can also trigger an Extreme Spirit Burst during
Unity Training!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Extreme Spirit Bursts are easier to trigger if the
team member in question participates in
Friendship Training.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Training is guaranteed to succeed if an Extreme
Spirit Burst occurs. That's the power of a team for
you!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Triggering Extreme Spirit Burst can earn you
special skill hints, so don't let the chance slip you
by! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's everything about team members and Unity
Training. Is there anything else you'd like to know
about?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Sure. I'd be happy to explain Team Ranking,
Team Power, and Team Titles.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can check your team's stats from the screen
where you select which activity to perform each
turn.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Your Team Ranking represents the position of
your team during the preseason.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can increase your ranking by winning races in
the Unity Cup. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The higher your Team Ranking, the more
motivated your team will be, and the better
they'll perform in the Unity Cup.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Do your best to get it as high as possible!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Team Power, as its name suggests, is your team's
overall power.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This will go up as you train your team members
through Unity Training.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
When your team's attributes reach certain
thresholds, it will also cause your training levels
to increase, so focus on making your team ever
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
As you increase your Team Power by building
your team members' attributes, you'll earn
upgrades to your clubroom when it reaches
certain levels.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Clubroom upgrades make it easier to recruit
talented members after each Unity Cup match.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Finally, there's your Team Title. This is a measure
of your overall performance during the
preseason, and is based on both your Team
Ranking and Team Power.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The better the Team Title you earn, the better
rewards you'll receive at the very end of your
playthrough.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I hope you give your all during the Unity Cup and
train to get the best title you can. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's everything about team stats. Is there
anything else you'd like to know about?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Very well! ♪ Just in case, I've prepared a summary
of everything you'll need to know.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Simply tap the "i" button in the top left of the
screen if you ever need a refresher.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I wish you the best of luck. I'll be cheering you on!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I wish you the best of luck. I'll be cheering
you on!
